name: Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients on medium-high speed until smooth, about 4 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into four pieces. Roll out each piece on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/16- to 1/8-inch.
4. Cut out cookies with cookie cutters.
5. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet and bake until pale brown and slightly firm to the touch, about 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and transfer to a cooling rack. Decorate as desired.
